title: Quick CPVP
description: This modpack has all of the settings and mods needed for crystal pvp. ;)
body:
**INFO:** Quick CPVP is a carefully designed modpack built with one goal in mind: delivering the best possible performance for Crystal PvP and tier testing. Every mod, setting, and optimization has been selected to ensure smooth, fast, and responsive gameplay even during the most intense fights.

This modpack is perfect for players who want to focus on PvP without dealing with lag, unnecessary features, or complicated setup. Whether you're practicing crystal mechanics, testing your skills against others, or just looking for a highly optimized experience, Quick CPVP has you covered.

It includes all the essential performance optimizations, PvP enhancing features, and quality of life improvements to help you react faster, play smoother, and perform at your best.
 
‎ 
 
### HOW TO INSTALL:
  1. Download the Modrinth app
  2. Search for Quick CPVP and click install
  3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!
